meaning: n.小酒店,酒吧,挂在鞍头的袋子
examples: "Cantina" is a Spanish word used to mean a bar.
Ackmena was the night-time bartender of the Mos Eisley Cantina on Tatooine.
A single Givin mask was crafted to fill in the cantina sequence in a New Hope.
And, of course, no trip to the avenue would be complete without an after-dinner drink at the funky Cantina Los Caballitos.
Maybe a remake of That Thing You Do starring the cantina band?
